title: The reflection from a Binary Bomb
content: 解决思路第一题第一个炸弹还是很好解开的，在phase_1(input)的时候用si，进去就可以看到的了x/s 0x[地址]然后就会看到答案了， 答案就是Border relations with Canada have never been better 第二题首先记得在phase_2的时候断点第二个的重点在于sscanf，在一个read_six_number的代码段内。 之后会整理的 test %eax, %eax:The point of it is testing whether the %eax is equal to zeroresult = %eax & %eax

title: Hello World
content: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.
